CustomMetadata.label: SRA-007 - Salesforce Health Check score below threshold

values.value: Salesforce Health Check score below threshold
The native Salesforce Security Health Check score for this org is below the configured threshold (default: 70). Salesforce calculates this score based on its own security setting recommendations.
A Health Check score below 70 indicates multiple Salesforce-recommended security settings are not configured. Each failing item represents a known attack vector documented by Salesforce.
Navigate to Setup > Security > Health Check. Address every High Risk and Medium Risk item in order of risk level. The Salesforce Help article linked from each item provides specific fix steps.
